mapper.insert: INSERT INTO network_traffic_rules ( customer_id, configuration_id, rule_name, rule_type, traffic_type, pattern, description, priority, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{configurationId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleType}, #{trafficType}, #{pattern}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{priority}, 0), COALESCE(#{enabled}, TRUE), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE network_traffic_rules SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, configuration_id = #{configurationId}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, traffic_type = #{trafficType}, pattern = #{pattern}, description = #{description}, priority = #{priority}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO network_traffic_logs ( device_id, customer_id, rule_id, url, domain, ip_address, port, app_package, action, timestamp, data_usage_bytes ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{customerId}, #{ruleId}, #{url}, #{domain}, #{ipAddress}, #{port}, #{appPackage}, #{action}, COALESCE(#{timestamp}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{dataUsageBytes}, 0) )
mapper.select: SELECT l.*, d.number AS device_number, r.rule_name, r.rule_type FROM network_traffic_logs l LEFT JOIN devices d ON l.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN network_traffic_rules r ON l.rule_id = r.id WHERE l.id = #{id} AND l.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT l.*, d.number AS device_number, r.rule_name, r.rule_type FROM network_traffic_logs l LEFT JOIN devices d ON l.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN network_traffic_rules r ON l.rule_id = r.id WHERE l.device_id = #{deviceId} AND l.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY l.timestamp DESC

SELECT l.*, d.number AS device_number, r.rule_name, r.rule_type FROM network_traffic_logs l LEFT JOIN devices d ON l.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN network_traffic_rules r ON l.rule_id = r.id WHERE l.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY l.timestamp DESC LIMIT 1000
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_network_settings ( device_id, customer_id, filtering_enabled, logging_enabled, strict_mode, proxy_host, proxy_port, proxy_enabled, dns_over_https_enabled, dns_over_https_url, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{customerId}, COALESCE(#{filteringEnabled}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{loggingEnabled}, TRUE), COALESCE(#{strictMode}, FALSE), #{proxyHost}, #{proxyPort}, COALESCE(#{proxyEnabled}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{dnsOverHttpsEnabled}, FALSE), #{dnsOverHttpsUrl}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, d.number AS device_number FROM device_network_settings s LEFT JOIN devices d ON s.device_id = d.id WHERE s.device_id = #{deviceId} AND s.customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE device_network_settings SET filtering_enabled = #{filteringEnabled}, logging_enabled = #{loggingEnabled}, strict_mode = #{strictMode}, proxy_host = #{proxyHost}, proxy_port = #{proxyPort}, proxy_enabled = #{proxyEnabled}, dns_over_https_enabled = #{dnsOverHttpsEnabled}, dns_over_https_url = #{dnsOverHttpsUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
